Source: Best Oasis Limited

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
22 August - 29 August 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye remained largely steady but subdued this week, with activity levels staying muted in most regions. In
India, the market saw a slight softening after holding stable in recent weeks, while domestic steel sales remain slower than usual due to seasonal weather
and the approaching festive period. In Bangladesh, overall conditions remain weak, with HKC compliance delays continuing to limit yard availability and
restrict buying activity.
